message: Abstract Boundary Anchor token (BA-*) is used where concrete implementation surface is required.
remediation: Replace BA-* placeholders with concrete boundary anchors tied to repository-backed surfaces.

message: Contracts are missing Repo Anchor declaration (or explicit TODO(REPO_ANCHOR) blocker).
remediation: Add Repo Anchor references for each contract surface, or mark unresolved items with TODO(REPO_ANCHOR).

message: Interface detail collaborators include unresolved or invented symbols.
remediation: Replace unresolved collaborator symbols with repository-anchored canonical symbols (or block with TODO(REPO_ANCHOR) when unresolved).

message: Interface details contain known placeholder/invented symbols or ambiguous boundary-anchor wording.
remediation: Replace placeholders with repository-anchored concrete symbols and use one normative boundary anchor per operation.

message: Interface details are missing explicit Contract Binding Row marker required by the interface-detail template.
remediation: Add a Contract Binding Row section and align its tuple keys (Operation ID / Boundary Anchor / IF Scope) to Stage 3 contract binding.

message: Interface details are missing explicit Implementation Entry Anchor required by the interface-detail template.
remediation: Add an Implementation Entry Anchor and align it to the first internal handoff entry that realizes the contract boundary.

message: Interface details are missing the Runtime Correctness Check section required for operation-local closure validation.
remediation: Add the Runtime Correctness Check section and keep unresolved items explicit as ok/gap evidence.

message: Interface details are missing the Boundary-to-entry reachability runtime check row.
remediation: Add Boundary-to-entry reachability evidence showing consumer entry reaches Implementation Entry Anchor within the first two request hops.

message: Interface details are missing the Field-ownership closure runtime check row.
remediation: Add Field-ownership closure evidence mapping contract-visible and behavior-significant fields to explicit UML owners.

message: Lifecycle anchors are missing from data model semantics.
remediation: Add lifecycle/state-transition anchors where domain semantics require them.
